overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a vibrant neon-lit night market. The player moves through covered food stalls, open streets with crowds, and darker back alleys in a futuristic cyberpunk setting with wet reflective pavement and dense neon signage.

events.description: camera turns slightly right to pass cooking vendor with steaming wok

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow covered market corridor past food vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor stirring food in wok over open flame
vendor wearing conical hat standing at stall

entered.detail: metal counter with cooking equipment and steam rising
various meats hanging from hooks above stall
illuminated sign with text PURE OVERALL
blue propane tanks next to cooking station
red and white striped fabric awning over walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow covered food stall area where vendors are actively cooking. Steam rises from woks while various meats hang above the counter. The camera moves forward through the corridor, passing a vendor wearing a conical hat, with blue gas canisters and striped awnings visible along the walkway.

events.description: exits covered walkway into open market street with tall buildings
passing under bright red neon signs reflecting on wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through open market street observing neon signs and crowds

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking through market browsing stalls

entered.detail: dark wet asphalt reflecting colorful neon lights
high-rise buildings covered in vertical neon advertisements
metal gateway marking transition from covered to open area
illuminated mobile food stall on the street

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered walkway through a metal archway, the scene opens into a wide market street with wet asphalt reflecting vibrant neon lights from towering buildings. The camera moves through moderate crowds of pedestrians browsing various street carts and stalls under the glow of vertical billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: market street with bar seating and food vendors

events.description: approaching outdoor bar area with seated customers and hanging TV
passing under warm red paper lanterns after cool neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor bar and food stalls with red lanterns

notable_agents.action: customer sitting at bar counter watching TV screen
person in bright pink jacket walking ahead through market

entered.detail: long counter with green stools and customers seated
illuminated screen showing video content above bar
traditional round red paper lanterns hanging over food stall
illuminated blue vending machine with glowing edges

segments.scene_description: Continuing through the market, the camera passes an outdoor bar where customers sit on green stools watching a hanging TV. The lighting shifts from cool neon to warm red paper lanterns suspended over a food stall. A vending machine glows blue on the right as pedestrians move through the moderate crowd.

events.description: turns into narrow darker alley away from main market street
approaching brighter light at end of dark alley passage

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit narrow alley with trash and debris on ground

notable_agents.action: figure standing near bright light at alley exit

entered.detail: tall concrete walls with graffiti and worn surfaces
scattered trash bags and wooden pallets stacked against wall
bright light source at end of narrow passage
large metal HVAC units attached to building exterior

segments.scene_description: Turning away from the bustling market, the camera enters a narrow dark alley with concrete walls covered in graffiti. Trash and wooden pallets line the left side while ventilation equipment is visible on the right. The scene is dimly lit except for a bright neon glow at the far end of the passage where a figure stands near the exit.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a crowded, steaming food corridor into a vibrant neon market street before descending into a dim, gritty alleyway. It begins within a narrow covered walkway where steam rises from woks and vendors cook beneath striped awnings, moving forward past blue gas canisters and hanging meats. As the camera passes through a metal archway, the scene opens into a wide street of wet asphalt reflecting towering neon billboards and the movement of browsing pedestrians. The path then leads past an outdoor bar with green stools and a shift toward warm red paper lanterns and glowing blue vending machines before turning away from the bustle. Finally, the camera enters a narrow dark alley lined with graffiti, trash, and ventilation equipment, moving toward a bright neon glow and a solitary figure at the far end of the passage.
